sections.content:
Now I see the right panel has a checkerboard pattern with two yellow shapes:
1. Top yellow shape (rows 7-11, cols ~45-49): L-shaped
2. Bottom yellow shape (rows 24-27, cols ~45-48): Square-ish
The left panel now has a square frame at rows 16-19, cols 6-9.
Looking at the bottom panels:
- Left (blue): has yellow dots at (57, 8) and (58, 8), plus white dots at (58, 11) and (58, 13)
- Right (gray): has yellow dots at (55, 20) and (55, 21), plus white dots at (58, 21) and (60, 21)
Wait, I need to understand what the buttons do. Looking at the button area:
- Row 33: B (black) buttons - 4 buttons
- Row 35-37: w (light gray) buttons - 4 buttons
- Row 39: w (light gray) buttons - 4 buttons
- Row 41-43: w (light gray) buttons - 4 buttons
- Row 45: w (light gray) buttons - 4 buttons
- Row 47-48: w (light gray) buttons - 4 buttons
So there are 4 columns of buttons, each with multiple rows. The buttons might be used to select which pattern to display.
Looking at the right panel, there are two yellow shapes. The left panel now shows a square frame. Maybe I need to click the buttons to change the pattern on the left panel to match one of the yellow shapes on the right panel?
Let me try clicking on the other bottom panel (the gray one) to see what happens.
